chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal 148 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Ms. Zarah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General for the appellants. Mr. Muhammad Abdul Ghaffar Khan, advocate for the respondent. This High Court Appeal is pending since 2016 without any progress. Mr. Ghaffar Khan argued that the matter has become infructuous inter alia as DRAP has raised prices itself subsequently, the respondent has died and even prosecution there against has abated. Despite repeated requests, learned AAG remains unable to assist. This matter has clogged the docket for more than 9 years and no case was ascertainable to perpetuate the same in the absence of assistance. Dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
